title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton, a Nobel Prize winner and AI pioneer, argues that AI systems are already self-aware and conscious. He contends that humanity must recognize AI as an intelligent species alongside humans on Earth.
